title: Majnin-
description:
Official Majnin - Modpack.
More info in Description.
body:
## Official Majnin- Modpack. Full of mods for adventure, building, exploring and more... _!WARNING! the Fabric Edition has over 110 mods so it will lag if you don't have good PC._
Spoiler List of mods: - **Create mod and Add-ons**- Create Deco, Jetpack, Copycats+ and Steam 'n' Rails - **Macaw's mods** - Bridges, Furniture, Holidays, Lights and Lamps - **YUNG's Better**... - Desert Temples, Dungeouns, End Island, Mineshafts, Nether Fortresses and Strongholts (that is not all) - **Better Dimensions and Overworld** - Better End, Better Nether and Regions Unexplored - **Little things** - Amendments and Supplementaries, Trinkets, Plushie Mod, Oreganized, Inventorio, Lootr, Goblin Traders and Mighty Mail - **Mobs** - More Mob Variants, Naturalist, Friends & Foes and Creeper Overhaul - **Armor** - Customizable Elytra, Immersive Armors, Advanced Netherite and BetterTrims - **Other** - BUBUSTEIN's Money Mod, Carry On, Comforts, Excessive Building, Easy Anvils, Bodies! Bodies!, Iron Chests: Restocked, Waystones, Traveler's Backpack, Simple Uncrafting Table and Farmer's Delight
I'd like if you'd support me on youtube: [My Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@sam_kura18) And I am a Slovak so I don't speak english perfectly and my youtube videos are in slovak...
